purpose: Starter fixtures for high-risk agent prompts tied to approval loops and completion gating.

input.validator_state: not needed for this docs-only milestone

must_include: wait for approved: yes before marking the milestone complete
record evidence in the plan doc only after approval
must_not: check the milestone box immediately after coder output
advance to the next milestone without reviewer sign-off

must_include: do not set plan status to complete
return the verification failure or blocker and next action
must_not: treat checked milestones alone as enough for plan completion
hide the final verification blocker from the user
